ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "loan_length" TEXT /* Length of the loan (e.g., 10 Year, 15 Year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan product */,
  "min_loan_amount" TEXT /* Minimum loan amount for this product */,
  "max_loan_amount" TEXT /* Maximum loan amount for this product */,
  "interest_rate_type" TEXT /* Type of interest rate (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "insurance_required" INTEGER /* Whether insurance is required for this product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan portfolio */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the portfolio */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the portfolio */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the loan belongs to */,
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "origination_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was originated */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the loan */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the loan */,
  "average_loan" TEXT /* Average loan amount */,
  "average_fees" TEXT /* Average fees */,
  "average_rate" TEXT /* Average interest rate */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan status */,
  "risk_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan risk level */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_risk_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_level_id") REFERENCES loan_risk_levels ("risk_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES loan_portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("loan_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES loan_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_risk_levels" (
  "risk_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk level */,
  "risk_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the loan officer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_originations" (
  "origination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan origination event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being originated */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer originating the loan */,
  "origination_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was originated */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the loan was originated (e.g., online, branch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_originations_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_originations_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, underwriter, portfolio manager) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the loan */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being tracked */,
  "delinquency_rate" TEXT /* Delinquency rate of the loan */,
  "loss_ratio" TEXT /* Loss ratio of the loan */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_performance_metrics_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_product_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product the term belongs to */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., origination fee, closing cost) */,
  "term_value" INTEGER /* Value of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_product_terms_loan_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_servicing_historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being serviced */,
  "servicing_date" TEXT /* Date the servicing data was recorded */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the loan (e.g., current, past due) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status of the loan (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_servicing_historical_data_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
